shared_case_surface: checkpoint-based long-horizon inquiry cases that keep checkpoint completeness, axis retention, contradiction posture, delta separation, and false-continuity pressure inspectable on the same restart-fidelity surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same checkpoint-and-relaunch question, keeps the inquiry checkpoint and relaunch evidence inspectable, and still covers stable relaunch, contradiction-preserving relaunch, explicit memory-versus-canon delta separation, summary-theater pressure, and hidden-raw-history pressure without turning the bundle into final-answer grading or broad long-horizon capability scoring.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect the inquiry checkpoint and relaunch evidence directly
active axis, open questions, and next tests remain visible before restart fidelity is judged
contradiction posture stays inspectable rather than being smoothed into summary prose
memory_delta and canon_delta remain distinct review objects when both are present
the public readout stays weaker than the visible checkpoint-and-relaunch evidence
